title: Jarvis
description: Items durability alerts, armor durability alerts, health bar, damage indicators, health monitor with JARVIS voice.
body:
JarvisPvP – Smart PvP Alerts and Combat Awareness

JarvisPvP is a combat-focused assistant built for players who want faster reactions, cleaner awareness, and less guesswork in every fight. It helps you stay locked in with clear warnings, a stylish in-world health bar, and real-time combat information that matters when fights get intense.

⭐ Built for PvP
⭐ Fast, clear, non-spammy alerts
⭐ English and Spanish support
⭐ Works great for practice, duels, Crystal PvP, KitPvP, and SMP combat

Top Features

Item Durability Alerts

  • Get warned before your weapon, tool, shield, or other important item is about to break
  • Low durability and critical durability warnings help you swap in time
  • Designed to keep you from losing fights because of surprise breaks

Armor Durability Alerts

  • Tracks your armor condition during combat and warns you before it becomes a real problem
  • Includes compromised, low, critical, and near-breaking armor warnings
  • Helps you react before your gear fails in the middle of a fight

In-World Health Bar

  • Shows a clean health bar beside players in the world for quick visual tracking
  • Easy to read, combat-friendly, and designed to stay useful without cluttering your screen
  • Customizable to match your preferred look and spacing

Health Alerts

  • Low health warning
  • Critical health warning
  • Alerts trigger at the right moments without constant repetition
  • Built to keep you informed without flooding you during hectic fights

More Combat Features

  • Totem alerts
  • Golden apple alerts
  • Ender pearl alerts
  • XP bottle alerts
  • Resource awareness for faster decision-making
  • Combat mode for focused PvP-only behavior
  • Optional crit indicator
  • Combat boss bar
  • Action bar alerts
  • Optional title and subtitle warnings
  • Audio alerts with English and Spanish support
  • In-game config menu with live changes
  • Keybinds for quick control
  • Clean, lightweight, and performance-conscious design

Why Players Use JarvisPvP

  • Stay ahead of armor breaks and item breaks
  • Track enemy health more easily during pressure fights
  • React faster to danger without staring at your inventory
  • Get useful warnings without annoying spam
  • Keep your attention on PvP instead of micromanaging everything manually

Perfect For

  • Practice PvP
  • Crystal PvP
  • KitPvP
  • SMP PvP
  • Duels
  • Competitive servers

Simple and Focused

JarvisPvP is made for awareness, not automation. It gives you the information you need to react faster, protect your gear, and stay in control when every second matters.

Fight smarter. React faster. Stay alive longer.
